name: My pre-existing back pain showed up after accident—did my AI chat about it hurt my Chicago case?
description: Yes—AI admissions undermine claims; expert medical proof needed.[1]

mainEntity.name: My pre-existing back pain showed up after accident—did my AI chat about it hurt my Chicago case?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes—AI admissions undermine claims; expert medical proof needed.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, if you speculated fault or minimized issues in AI, it's discoverable ammo.[1] Insurers exploit inconsistencies.[1] Key factors: AI records show prior knowledge; contradicts 'new injury' claim; no privilege.[1] Get medical expert linking aggravation; disclose to lawyer; avoid self-diagnosis tools.[1] Focus on records.
